# The Motions

> Premium scroll-animated web platform for The Motions ‚Äî a creative IP and solopreneur brand companion built around the Mo Town universe (25 characters, 250 quotes, geography, arcs, exacerbator interactions) and an 8-module / 216-path workbook program.

## Project Overview

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 15 (App Router) ¬∑ TypeScript ¬∑ Tailwind ¬∑ Framer Motion ¬∑ Lenis ¬∑ sharp ¬∑ Supabase ¬∑ Vercel
**Status:** Phase 1 complete on `perry-phase1` ‚Äî Mo Town cartoon visual identity, full graphics wired, structured character profiles, mobile pass. v2 (paid gated workbook program with Stripe) deferred.
**Purpose:** Public face for The Motions IP. Free public lore + quote library + waitlist now; paid workbook program later.

## Core Documentation

- `README.md` ‚Äî (not at repo root; see `web/README.md` for run instructions)
- `CODE_MAP.md` ‚Äî Feature-to-file map
- `docs/ai/memory.md` ‚Äî Project history and current state
- `docs/ai/roadmap.md` ‚Äî Forward-looking priorities
- `docs/ai/tasks.md` ‚Äî Active work
- `docs/ai/decisions.md` ‚Äî Architecture decisions (ADRs)
- `docs/ai/architecture.md` ‚Äî System design
- `docs/asset-map.md` ‚Äî Graphics(1) numbered-file audit + per-character art availability matrix
- `ENTRY_POINTS.md` ‚Äî Where execution starts
- `DATA_FLOW.md` ‚Äî System-level data movement
- `IMPORT_GRAPH_SUMMARY.md` ‚Äî Dependency hotspots
- `FEATURE_BOUNDARIES.md` ‚Äî Component responsibilities

## Key Files by Area

### Web app (Next.js)
- `web/app/page.tsx` ‚Äî Cinematic homepage
- `web/app/layout.tsx` ‚Äî Root layout, fonts, Lenis provider, nav/footer
- `web/app/universe/page.tsx` ‚Äî Mo Town overview
- `web/app/universe/characters/page.tsx` ‚Äî Character index
- `web/app/universe/characters/[slug]/page.tsx` ‚Äî Character profile (SSG via `generateStaticParams`)
- `web/app/universe/{geography,lore,arcs,exacerbators}/page.tsx` ‚Äî Narrative pages
- `web/app/quotes/page.tsx` ‚Äî Quote library
- `web/app/workbook/page.tsx` ‚Äî Workbook sales page
- `web/app/api/waitlist/route.ts` ‚Äî Waitlist API

### Animation primitives
- `web/lib/animations/LenisProvider.tsx`
- `web/components/motion/{TextReveal,RevealOnView,Parallax,Marquee}.tsx`

### Decor + brand primitives
- `web/components/decor/Squiggle.tsx` ‚Äî Squiggle, Zigzag, ShakeLines, Dot SVG components
- `web/components/decor/Sticker.tsx` ‚Äî Cartoon-style rotated chip with offset shadow
- `web/components/decor/CharacterPortrait.tsx` ‚Äî CharacterPortrait / HeroCard / Title / Scene loaders + `hasPortrait` / `hasHeroCard` / `hasTitle` / `hasScene` presence checks
- `web/components/decor/QuotePost.tsx` ‚Äî `hasQuotePost(id)` + QuotePost component

### Content pipeline (build-time)
- `web/scripts/build-content.ts` ‚Äî Parses source docs ‚Üí JSON (includes structured CharacterTraits extraction)
- `web/scripts/optimize-images.ts` ‚Äî sharp pipeline: source PNG ‚Üí resized WebP per role directory
- `web/scripts/remap-illustrations.ts` ‚Äî Re-runnable mover that codifies the Graphics(1) audit mapping
- `web/content/*.json` ‚Äî Generated artifacts (committed)
- `web/lib/content.ts` ‚Äî Typed loader; exports `getCharacter`, `getQuotesByCharacter`, `getPair` helpers + `CharacterTraits` type

### Assets
- `web/public/assets/characters/{slug}.webp` ‚Äî small character portraits (16 of 25)
- `web/public/assets/hero-cards/{slug}.webp` ‚Äî character + name plate art (25 of 25)
- `web/public/assets/scenes/{slug}.webp` ‚Äî rich location panels (23 of 25)
- `web/public/assets/titles/{slug}.webp` ‚Äî wordmark-only title cards (18 of 25)
- `web/public/assets/quote-posts/{id}.webp` ‚Äî designed quote posters (88 of 250)
- `web/public/assets/illustrations/{welcome,cast}.webp` ‚Äî Mo Town billboard + cast group shot
- `web/public/assets/logo/motions-outlined.png` ‚Äî official bubble wordmark

### Backend
- `web/lib/supabase/server.ts` ‚Äî Supabase SSR client
- `web/supabase/migrations/0001_init.sql` ‚Äî `waitlist` table + RLS

### Source content (read by the pipeline only)
- `Character Documentation/*.docx`
- `The Motions Workbook Compotents/{Module*.xlsx,motions_complete_250_quotes.csv}`
- `THE MOTIONS UNIVERSE LORE - CLIENT WORK CONNECTION.docx`

## Common Tasks

**To run locally:** `cd web && npm install && npm run content:build && npm run dev`
**To rebuild content from sources:** `cd web && npm run content:build` (re-run any time a source `.docx`/`.xlsx`/`.csv` changes)
**To optimize new image assets:** drop PNGs into the relevant `web/public/assets/<role>/` folder, then `cd web && npm run assets:optimize` (sharp converts to WebP in place ‚Äî see ADR-007)
**To deploy:** push `main` to GitHub; Vercel auto-deploys. Project must have Root Directory = `web` and Framework Preset = Next.js. Don't run `next build` locally while `next dev` is running ‚Äî it clobbers vendor chunks the dev server depends on.
**To add a character:** add a row to `motions_complete_250_quotes.csv`, re-run content pipeline. (The CSV is canonical ‚Äî see `docs/ai/decisions.md` ADR-003. If the docx uses a different name, add an entry to `NAME_ALIASES` in `scripts/build-content.ts`.)
**To edit narrative pages (geography/lore/arcs/exacerbators):** edit the source `.docx` in `Character Documentation/`, re-run content pipeline.
**To apply a Supabase migration:** paste the SQL from `web/supabase/migrations/*.sql` into the Supabase SQL Editor (no migration runner wired).
**To recover from `__webpack_modules__[moduleId] is not a function` in dev:** stop dev server ‚Üí `rm -rf web/.next` ‚Üí `npm run dev` ‚Üí hard-refresh the browser.

## Environment Variables

Set in `web/.env.local` (and as Vercel project env vars):

- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` ‚Äî Supabase project URL (no trailing path)
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` ‚Äî publishable key (`sb_publishable_‚Ä¶` or legacy anon JWT)
- `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` ‚Äî secret key (`sb_secret_‚Ä¶` or legacy service_role JWT); server-only, never expose

When `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` is unset, `/api/waitlist` soft-fails with `{ok: true, queued: false}` so local dev still works.
